[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

1 1000010010 3
2 0111100100 5
3 1001110001 5
4 1011000000 3
5 0110110011 6
6 0011000101 4
7 1011111011 8
